{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/109808848?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/manop55555", "id": 109808848, "login": "manop55555", "node_id": "U_kgDOBouM0A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/manop55555", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:A/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "### Summary

When running `nuxt dev`, Nuxt registers an unauthenticated route at `/.well-known/appspecific/com.chrome.devtools.json` that returns the absolute filesystem path of the project root and a per-project UUID persisted to `node_modules/.cache/nuxt/chrome-workspace.json`. The route is enabled by default via `experimental.chromeDevtoolsProjectSettings: true`.

The endpoint exists to let Chrome DevTools' Workspace integration map sources to the developer's local checkout. The handler is registered directly on `nitro.options.devHandlers` and does not pass through the CORS / origin wrapper that the rest of the dev pipeline uses, so it has no host / origin / `Sec-Fetch-Site` check of its own.

### Impact

Dev-server only. Production builds do not register the route.

Two values are disclosed:

- `workspace.root`: the absolute filesystem path of the project (commonly reveals the OS username and the on-disk project name).
- `workspace.uuid`: a v4 UUID persisted to `node_modules/.cache/nuxt/chrome-workspace.json`, stable across dev-server restarts and re-clones.

### Threat model

The response carries no `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` header. A cross-origin `fetch()` from an arbitrary malicious page is therefore blocked by the browser's same-origin policy and cannot read the body. The two realistic recovery paths are:

1. **LAN-adjacent attacker** when the developer runs `nuxt dev --host` (or otherwise binds to a non-loopback interface). A plain `curl http://<dev-lan-ip>:3000/.well-known/appspecific/com.chrome.devtools.json` returns the JSON; no browser, no CORS.
2. **DNS rebinding** against the default loopback dev server. A page the developer visits resolves to the attacker, then re-resolves to `127.0.0.1` after the TTL; the browser believes the request is same-origin and reads the response.

### Affected versions

`nuxt@4.0.0-alpha.1` (PR #32084) through `nuxt@4.4.6`. `3.x` is not affected.

### Reproduction

```bash
npx nuxt dev
curl -s http://localhost:3000/.well-known/appspecific/com.chrome.devtools.json
# {"workspace":{"uuid":"...","root":"/Users/<name>/..."}}
```

### Workaround

Set `experimental: { chromeDevtoolsProjectSettings: false }` in `nuxt.config.ts`. Chrome DevTools' Workspace auto-integration will stop working; the dev server is otherwise unaffected.

### Patches

Fixed in `nuxt@4.4.7` by [#35201](https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/pull/35201) (commit [`55c75b78`](https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/commit/55c75b78c989b8bd210837b0e5faaebbf2b87b15)). The handler is now routed through the same host / origin gate the rest of the dev server uses, so the endpoint only responds to requests that look local.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rq7w-g337-39qq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-15T20:56:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rq7w-g337-39qq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rq7w-g337-39qq"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-15T20:56:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/security/advisories/GHSA-rq7w-g337-39qq", "https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/pull/35201", "https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt/commit/55c75b78c989b8bd210837b0e5faaebbf2b87b15", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rq7w-g337-39qq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nuxt/nuxt/security-advisories/GHSA-rq7w-g337-39qq", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nuxt/nuxt", "summary": "Nuxt: Dev server discloses project absolute path and persistent workspace UUID via `/.well-known/appspecific/com.chrome.devtools.json`", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-15T20:56:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rq7w-g337-39qq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.4.7", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nuxt"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0-alpha.1, < 4.4.7"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Nuxt: Dev server discloses project absolute path and persistent workspace UUID via `/.well-known/appspecific/com.chrome.devtools.json`
